en.tagline: A calmer face for the place you write code.
en.footer: Does not change your Cursor install. Everything stays on this PC.
en.welcome: Welcome. Pick a wallpaper, then Apply Skin. Desk pets are separate — choose one below. Or use the helper icon in the notification area.
en.applyCancelled: Apply cancelled — restart was not approved.
en.restartBody:
Cursor needs to restart once so the skin can appear.

Open windows and files stay open, but the current Agent chat will pause.

Restart and apply now?
en.restoreBody: Remove the Dream Skin look and go back to official Cursor?\n\nFully quit Cursor and open it the usual way if you want a completely clean start.
en.removalWarn: Restore had a hiccup — try reloading Cursor windows if needed.
en.noCdp: Cursor was not in skin mode; local status cleared.
en.restoreOk: Restored. Quit and reopen Cursor the usual way for a fully clean start.
en.previewEmpty: Pick a wallpaper or desk pet to preview
en.customHint: Pick a wallpaper (PNG / JPG / WEBP). Colors are chosen automatically.
en.imageTooBig: Image must be 20 MB or smaller.
en.wizardBody: Dream Skin needs to know where Cursor is. We can look in common places, or you can pick it once.
en.wizardNeedPath: Please pick a valid Cursor.exe first.
en.hintNeedCursor: Choose Cursor.exe to continue — Browse, or paste the full path.
en.hintSkinActive: Skin is on. Switch themes anytime; Restore takes it off.
en.hintCdpIdle: Cursor is ready for a skin, but nothing is attached yet. Tap Apply Skin.
en.hintRestartNeeded: Cursor is open. Apply will ask to restart once so the skin can appear.
en.hintReadyLaunch: Cursor is closed. Apply Skin will start it for you.
en.softVerifyWarn: Applied. If something looks off after a Cursor update, Apply Skin again.
en.deleteBody: Permanently delete {0}? Built-in themes cannot be removed.
en.pairColor: After apply, remind me to match Cursor’s color theme (we never edit your settings)
en.pairBodyDark:
This skin is dark. For clearer text, switch Cursor’s Color Theme to a dark one too.

Shortcut: Ctrl+K, then Ctrl+T
Suggested: Dark Modern / Cursor Dark

Dream Skin will not change your settings file.
en.pairBodyLight:
This skin is light. For clearer text, switch Cursor’s Color Theme to a light one too.

Shortcut: Ctrl+K, then Ctrl+T

Dream Skin will not change your settings file.

zh.tagline: 给每天写代码的地方，换一张更舒服的脸。
zh.footer: 不会改动 Cursor 的安装文件。一切都在你这台电脑上完成。
zh.welcome: 欢迎。上面选壁纸并点「应用皮肤」；桌宠单独选择，换了就会出现在右下角。也可从右下角小助手图标切换。
zh.applyCancelled: 已取消——这次没有同意重启。
zh.restartBody:
第一次挂上皮肤时，需要重启一次 Cursor。

已打开的窗口和文件会保留，但当前的 Agent 对话会暂停。

现在重启并应用吗？
zh.restoreBody: 去掉 Dream Skin，回到 Cursor 原来的样子？\n\n若想彻底清干净，请完全退出 Cursor，再用平常方式打开。
zh.cdpIdle: 已就绪 · 皮肤尚未挂上
zh.removedOk: 已从当前窗口去掉皮肤。
zh.removalWarn: 还原时有点不顺利——如有需要，重新加载一下 Cursor 窗口。
zh.noCdp: 当前没有在换肤状态；已清理本地记录。
zh.restoreOk: 已还原。完全退出并用平常方式重开 Cursor，会更干净。
zh.previewEmpty: 选择壁纸或桌宠以预览
zh.customHint: 选一张壁纸（PNG / JPG / WEBP），配色会自动生成。
zh.wizardBody: Dream Skin 需要知道 Cursor 装在哪里。可以自动查找，也可以你手动选一次。
zh.hintNeedCursor: 请先选好 Cursor.exe——用「浏览」，或粘贴完整路径。
zh.hintSkinActive: 皮肤已挂上。随时可换主题；「还原」会去掉皮肤。
zh.hintCdpIdle: 已经可以换肤，但还没挂上。点一下「应用皮肤」即可。
zh.hintRestartNeeded: Cursor 正在运行。应用时会请你重启一次，皮肤才能出现。
zh.hintReadyLaunch: Cursor 还没打开。点「应用皮肤」会帮你启动。
zh.softVerifyWarn: 已应用。若 Cursor 升级后样子不对，再点一次「应用皮肤」。
zh.showHidden: 显示额外 / 测试主题
zh.deleteBody: 确定永久删除「{0}」？自带主题不能删。
zh.pairColor: 应用后提醒我配对编辑器配色（不会改你的设置文件）
zh.pairBodyDark:
这套皮肤偏深色。文字更好读的做法，是把 Cursor 的 Color Theme 也切到深色。

快捷键：Ctrl+K，再按 Ctrl+T
推荐：Dark Modern / Cursor Dark

Dream Skin 不会改你的设置文件。
zh.pairBodyLight:
这套皮肤偏浅色。文字更好读的做法，是把 Cursor 的 Color Theme 也切到浅色。

快捷键：Ctrl+K，再按 Ctrl+T

Dream Skin 不会改你的设置文件。
